notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson hits a sacrifice bunt. Junior Caminero scores. Ryan Vilade scores. Ben Williamson to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Noah Schultz.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tanner Murray reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Edgar Quero to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Tanner Murray reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero. Edgar Quero to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Yandy Díaz to 3rd. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
